query:

ADD COLUMN directPrintEnabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN directPrintIp VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN directPrintPort INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 9100;
